'''zajal''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:half siblings|half siblings]] (mother's male phase)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-j-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:half siblings|half siblings]] (mother's male phase)
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæjilith|zæjilith]] || [[word:zæjilij|zæjilij]] || [[word:zæjilish|zæjilish]] || [[word:zæjili|zæjili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zajujuluth|zajujuluth]] || [[word:zajujuluj|zajujuluj]] || [[word:zajujulush|zajujulush]] || [[word:zajujulu|zajujulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zajuluth|zajuluth]] || [[word:zajuluj|zajuluj]] || [[word:zajulush|zajulush]] || [[word:zajulu|zajulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zajufluth|zajufluth]] || [[word:zajufluj|zajufluj]] || [[word:zajuflush|zajuflush]] || [[word:zajufluf|zajufluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæjeleth|zæjeleth]] || [[word:zæjelej|zæjelej]] || [[word:zæjelesh|zæjelesh]] || [[word:zæjele|zæjele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zajojoloth|zajojoloth]] || [[word:zajojoloj|zajojoloj]] || [[word:zajojolosh|zajojolosh]] || [[word:zajojolo|zajojolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zajoloth|zajoloth]] || [[word:zajoloj|zajoloj]] || [[word:zajolosh|zajolosh]] || [[word:zajolo|zajolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zajofloth|zajofloth]] || [[word:zajofloj|zajofloj]] || [[word:zajoflosh|zajoflosh]] || [[word:zajoflof|zajoflof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || — || — || — || [[word:zajïflïf|zajïflïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || — || — || — || [[word:zajïfjïflïf|zajïfjïflïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæjælæth|zæjælæth]] || [[word:zæjælæj|zæjælæj]] || [[word:zæjælæsh|zæjælæsh]] || [[word:zæjælæ|zæjælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zajajalath|zajajalath]] || [[word:zajajalaj|zajajalaj]] || [[word:zajajalash|zajajalash]] || [[word:zajajala|zajajala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zajalath|zajalath]] || [[word:zajalaj|zajalaj]] || [[word:zajalash|zajalash]] || [[word:zajala|zajala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zajaflath|zajaflath]] || [[word:zajaflaj|zajaflaj]] || [[word:zajaflash|zajaflash]] || [[word:zajaflaf|zajaflaf]]
|}

''50 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zajalatha|zajalatha]] || [[word:zajalaja|zajalaja]] || [[word:zajalasha|zajalasha]] || [[word:zajalaka|zajalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zajalath|zajalath]] || [[word:zajalaj|zajalaj]] || [[word:zajalash|zajalash]] || [[word:zajala|zajala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zajalathal|zajalathal]] || [[word:zajalajal|zajalajal]] || [[word:zajalashal|zajalashal]] || [[word:zajalakal|zajalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zajalathatha|zajalathatha]] || [[word:zajalajaja|zajalajaja]] || [[word:zajalashasha|zajalashasha]] || [[word:zajalaka|zajalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zajalathan|zajalathan]] || [[word:zajalajan|zajalajan]] || [[word:zajalashan|zajalashan]] || [[word:zajalakan|zajalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zajalathaoro|zajalathaoro]] || [[word:zajalajaoro|zajalajaoro]] || [[word:zajalashaoro|zajalashaoro]] || [[word:zajalakaoro|zajalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|66806d6}}
